title: Rebrand to zakariasadeq7site123, update games to unblocked style, and update shows with Breaking Bad + popular TV

requirements.summary: Rebrand the entire site from 'NexHub' to 'zakariasadeq7site123' across all UI touchpoints including Navigation, HeroSection, Footer, and HTML title tag
acceptanceCriteria: The HeroSection displays 'zakariasadeq7site123' as the site name
The Footer displays 'zakariasadeq7site123' as the site logo/name
No instance of the old name 'NexHub' remains visible in the UI

file_operations.description: Update the <title> tag and meta description to replace 'NexHub' with 'zakariasadeq7site123' so the browser tab displays the new site name
Replace all instances of 'NexHub' in the logo area and navigation branding with 'zakariasadeq7site123' to reflect the new site name in the top navigation bar
Update the headline and logo text from 'NexHub' to 'zakariasadeq7site123' in the hero section to display the new site branding prominently on the landing area
Replace 'NexHub' with 'zakariasadeq7site123' in the footer logo and branding text to ensure consistent site naming at the bottom of the page

requirements.summary: Update the Games section to feature at least 6 unblocked/proxy-style games (Slope, 1v1.LOL, Cookie Clicker, Run 3, Drift Hunters, Retro Bowl) with publicly accessible embed URLs, replacing the current game list
acceptanceCriteria: At least 6 unblocked/proxy-style games are displayed in the Games section grid
Each game card shows a title, thumbnail (or emoji fallback), and a Play Now button
Clicking Play Now opens the game in the GamePlayer modal iframe
Games are inspired by the Hypcal/Totally Science catalog (Slope, Run 3, Cookie Clicker, etc.)
Backend games array is updated with the new game entries

file_operations.description: Replace the hardcoded fallback games array with at least 6 unblocked/proxy-style games including Slope, 1v1.LOL, Cookie Clicker, Run 3, Drift Hunters, and Retro Bowl. Each entry should include title, description, embedUrl (publicly accessible iframe URL), and thumbnailUrl (or emoji fallback). Ensure the GamePlayer modal can load these iframe URLs when Play Now is clicked

requirements.summary: Update the Shows section to include Breaking Bad and at least 5 other popular TV shows (The Office, Game of Thrones, Stranger Things, The Wire, Peaky Blinders, The Sopranos), each with a YouTube trailer embed URL accessible via Watch Now button
acceptanceCriteria: Breaking Bad appears as a show entry in the Shows section
At least 6 popular TV shows are displayed in the Shows section grid
Each show card shows a title, cover image or emoji fallback, description, and Watch Now button
Clicking Watch Now opens a YouTube embed for that show's trailer in the VideoPlayer modal
Backend shows array is updated with the new show entries including YouTube embed URLs

file_operations.description: Replace the hardcoded fallback shows array with at least 6 popular TV shows including Breaking Bad, The Office, Game of Thrones, Stranger Things, The Wire, Peaky Blinders, and The Sopranos. Each entry should include title, description, embedUrl (YouTube trailer embed URL in format https://www.youtube.com/embed/VIDEO_ID), and thumbnailUrl (or emoji fallback). Ensure the VideoPlayer modal can load these YouTube embeds when Watch Now is clicked
